# Acode — Code Editor with Linux Terminal & AI Coding

> Open-source Code Editor with a full Alpine Linux terminal. Run Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode on your phone. Node.js, React, Next.js, Python, Git, SSH, and 250+ plugins. 3.6M+ downloads. Built by Foxbiz Software Pvt. Ltd.

Acode is the only Android app that combines a professional code editor with a native Alpine Linux terminal (proot-based, no root required). It supports 100+ languages with syntax highlighting, uses the apk package manager for Linux packages, and enables desktop-grade development workflows entirely on a phone.

Key capabilities:
- Native Alpine Linux terminal with bash, zsh, apk package manager
- Runs Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, and OpenCode natively
- Node.js, npm, React, Next.js, Python, Git — install and run via terminal
- SSH client, FTP/SFTP support, Git integration
- 250+ community plugins (AI assistants, themes, language support, build tools)
- Free and open source (MIT license) on F-Droid and Google Play

## AI Coding

- [Claude Code on Android](https://acode.app/claude-code-android): Run Anthropic's Claude Code agentic AI coding CLI on your phone — full setup guide
- [Codex on Android](https://acode.app/codex-android): Run OpenAI Codex on Android with the Alpine Linux terminal
- [OpenCode on Android](https://acode.app/opencode-android): Run the open-source AI coding agent on your phone
- [AI Coding on Android](https://acode.app/ai-coding-android): Complete guide to AI-assisted development on mobile
- [Cursor Alternative for Android](https://acode.app/cursor-alternative-android): How Acode compares to Cursor's AI-powered IDE
- [Windsurf Alternative for Android](https://acode.app/windsurf-alternative-android): Codeium Windsurf alternative on mobile

## Linux Terminal & DevOps

- [Linux Terminal for Android](https://acode.app/linux-terminal-android): Full Alpine Linux terminal with proot — no root needed
- [Termux Alternative](https://acode.app/termux-alternative): Why Acode is the upgrade from Termux — same terminal plus a real code editor
- [SSH on Android](https://acode.app/ssh-android): SSH client setup and remote development guide
- [Git on Android](https://acode.app/git-android): Full Git workflow — clone, commit, push, branch from your phone

## Development Frameworks

- [Node.js on Android](https://acode.app/nodejs-android): Install Node.js and run JavaScript apps on your phone
- [npm on Android](https://acode.app/npm-android): Package management and npm workflow on mobile
- [React on Android](https://acode.app/react-android): React development environment with live preview
- [Next.js on Android](https://acode.app/nextjs-android): Full Next.js development on your phone
- [Web Development on Android](https://acode.app/web-development-android): Complete web dev guide for mobile

## Comparisons & Alternatives

- [Code Editor Guide](https://acode.app/android-ide): Why Acode is the most complete Android development environment
- [VS Code Alternative for Android](https://acode.app/vscode-alternative-android): VS Code-like experience on mobile
- [Spck Editor Alternative](https://acode.app/spck-alternative): How Acode compares to Spck Editor
